packageClosure.scope: Final closure evidence for Atlas V5 Complete Execution Package

programClosure.reason: Train L through Train Z implementation has not started or completed.
programClosure.requiredForClosure: 750/750 PASS with required L-Z evidence committed and reviewed.

authorizedNextStep: Husam is cleared to begin Train L upon Founder directive.
packageFreeze: The L-Z plan is frozen and approved as the controlling Atlas V5 execution package. No additional Atlas V5 execution package is required before completion unless Founder or Kimi reopens the package.
